subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Akbar! God grant that thou mayest, through the grace of the Lord of Lords, be joyous and triumphant, and at all times [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی قبل اکبر انشاء الله از عنایت رب الارباب مسرور و فائز باشی و در کل احیان از
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @living waters; water of life, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment
